design_philosophy: A sophisticated, high-contrast black and gold aesthetic that conveys authority, exclusivity, and premium quality. Perfect for a top-tier corporate, tax, and legal firm.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif font-medium tracking-tight text-white
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-serif font-medium tracking-tight text-white

navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/80 border-b border-[#D4AF37]/20
navbar.links: text-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-white hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#BF953F] via-[#FCF6BA] to-[#B38728] text-black font-semibold rounded-none px-8 py-3 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 font-semibold rounded-none px-8 py-3 transition-colors

cards.base: bg-[#111111] border border-[#D4AF37]/15 p-8 transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: bg-[#050505] border-b border-[#D4AF37]/30 text-white rounded-none px-0 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-0 w-full transition-colors

hero.layout: min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center relative overflow-hidden pt-24
hero.background: Dark gold texture image with heavy black overlay (bg-black/80) to ensure text readability.
hero.title: Use font_heading. Apply text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-[#BF953F] via-[#FCF6BA] to-[#B38728] for a premium metallic text effect.
hero.stats: Horizontal flex, divided by thin gold lines (divider).

quienes_somos.images: Asymmetric layout. Use the corporate professionals image.
quienes_somos.floating_card: Gold gradient background card with black text, absolute positioned floating over the main image.

valores.card_style: Minimalist, icon on top, heading, short description. Use 'cards.base' and 'cards.hover'.

servicios.layout: Dense bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4).
servicios.style: Cards with minimalist 1px gold border. Hover effect brightens border.

bolsa_trabajo.layout: Two columns: left side text/value prop, right side minimalist form.
bolsa_trabajo.form: Use customized Shadcn form elements. No rounded corners (rounded-none).

blog.layout: Tabs for categories. Grid of 3 columns for articles.
blog.card: Image on top, content below. Minimalist.

contacto.layout: Grid of 3 cards for the offices.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All cards should subtly lift (-translate-y-1) and increase border opacity. Text should brighten.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Fade in and slide up for sections as they enter viewport using framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.buttons: Primary buttons should have a subtle brightness increase on hover.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install lucide-react for icons and framer-motion for animations.
Use Cormorant Garamond for headings and Outfit for body text from Google Fonts.
Ensure all backgrounds are #050505 (not standard Tailwind neutral).
Use the provided metallic logo in the Hero section, and the white or metallic logo in the Navbar.
For the 'floating golden card' in Quiénes Somos, use bg-gradient-to-r from-[#BF953F] to-[#B38728] with text-black for high contrast.
Floating WhatsApp button should have a dark aesthetic (black background, gold border, gold icon) or use standard WhatsApp green but refined.
Use the exact media URLs provided in this file. NEVER use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
